title: Atmospheric Intelligence Engine (AIE): reference implementation for urban air quality forecasting (Seberang Jaya, Malaysia, 2018-2021)
description:
Reference implementation accompanying the manuscript Self-Optimizing Neural Architectures for Urban Air Quality Forecasting and Scenario Analysis: A Case Study of Seberang Jaya, Malaysia (2018-2021), submitted to Environmental Science: Atmospheres (RSC).

Includes an end-to-end pipeline for hourly multi-horizon forecasting (1 h - 168 h), the Atmospheric Intelligence Engine neural architecture with MC-dropout uncertainty quantification, strong baselines (persistence, XGBoost, LSTM), a scenario sensitivity module, and all scripts required to regenerate every figure and table in the manuscript.

The raw observational dataset is governed by a data-use agreement and is not bundled with this archive; a deterministic synthetic sample is included for continuous integration.
